name: K92 Mining Inc.
description: K92 Mining Inc. owns and operates the high-grade Kainantu Gold Mine in the Eastern Highlands Province of Papua New Guinea, producing gold, copper, and silver from an underground mine spanning approximately 830 km². The company completed its Stage 3 plant expansion in October 2025, significantly growing throughput, and is targeting 190,000–225,000 gold-equivalent ounces in 2026 with a Stage 4 expansion underway. K92 is a mid-tier producer with a stated goal of becoming a Tier 1 operation through continued underground expansion and near-mine exploration.
